description_long: A length of clothesline is suspended horizontally, with several pieces of laundry hanging from it using clothespins. The items include a pair of pants, a shirt, a towel, and other garments, each rendered in muted pastel colors. The line is taut and appears to be made of a thin, flexible material, likely rope or wire. The garments are spaced evenly along the line, each draping naturally with slight folds and creases. The overall appearance suggests a typical outdoor laundry setup, commonly seen in urban neighborhoods or residential courtyards. The scene evokes a sense of everyday life and domestic routine.
description: A horizontal clothesline with various pastel-colored garments hanging from it, held by clothespins. The setup resembles a typical outdoor laundry scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing all garments clearly hanging from the clothesline, with each item and clothespin visible.
description_view_1: Side view where the clothesline appears as a thin line, and the garments are barely visible, seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the backs of the garments and the arrangement of clothespins.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the clothesline as a thin line with minimal visibility of the garments.
